uplink.description: LPP stream: temperature, humidity, CO2, VOC, pressure, battery, setpoint (covers climate + air-quality requires)
uplink._note: Synthetic in-bounds LPP frame; expected derived by running reference/upstream-codec.js (DecodeLPPPayload) and normalizing: 0x10 TEMP 235/10=23.5C, 0x11 RHUM 48%, 0x12 CO2 600ppm, 0x13 VOC 120, 0x30 ATM_P 1013 hPa, 0x54 VBAT 75*20=1500mV=1.5V, 0x63 SETPOINT 22.

uplink.description: LPP stream: negative temperature, occupancy/motion, visible light, hi-res battery
uplink._note: Synthetic LPP frame exercising signed temp and the 2-byte tag path; expected derived from reference/upstream-codec.js: 0x10 TEMP 0xFFF6 -> -10/10 = -1.0C, 0x11 RHUM 40%, 0x12 CO2 500ppm, 0x40 VISIBLE_LIGHT 350 lux, 0x41 OCCU0 byte 11 -> state=11&1=1 (detected), count=11>>1=5, 0x8540 VBAT_HI_RES 3300mV = 3.3V.

uplink.description: Holding-register frame (fPort 4): temperature, humidity, CO2, VOC, setpoint, fan
uplink._note: Synthetic fPort-4 HR frame; expected derived from reference/upstream-codec.js (DecodeHR): reg 500 TEMP 235/10=23.5C, 501 RHUM 48%, 505 CO2 600ppm, 506 VOC 120, 103 SETPOINT 220/10=22.0C, 104 FAN 2.

uplink.description: Unrecognized LPP identifier returns an error
uplink._note: Synthetic; tag 0x7F is unmapped. Upstream silently bails (i = data.length) and returns {data:{}}; our contract forbids bare {} so we surface an error.
